questions.question: "Keep fingers crossed" means:/ "Keep fingers crossed" का अर्थ है:
options: To hope for good luck or a positive outcome
questions.explanation: It is a gesture used to wish for luck or to show that you hope something will happen as you want it to.

questions.question: To "Throw in the towel" means:/ "Throw in the towel" का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to admit that you have been defeated and stop trying.

questions.question: To be "At loggerheads" means:/ "At loggerheads" होने का अर्थ है:
options: To be in a state of strong disagreement or quarrel
questions.explanation: It means to be in a strong disagreement.

questions.question: "Bury the hatchet" means:/ "Bury the hatchet" का अर्थ है:
options: To make peace and end a conflict
questions.explanation: It means to stop an argument and become friends again.

questions.question: "Read between the lines" means:/ "Read between the lines" का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to understand a message that is not stated directly but is implied.

questions.question: "Spill the beans" means:/ "Spill the beans" का अर्थ है:
options: To reveal a secret accidentally or prematurely
questions.explanation: It means to disclose information that was supposed to be kept secret.

questions.question: To "Raise Cain" is to:/ "Raise Cain" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To create a lot of trouble or a noisy disturbance
questions.explanation: It means to behave in a very loud, angry, or violent way.

questions.question: To "Toe the line" is to:/ "Toe the line" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To obey the rules or standards
questions.explanation: It means to accept the authority of a group or to obey the rules.

questions.question: Something that "Sets teeth on edge" is:/ जो "Sets teeth on edge" है:
questions.explanation: It means to cause someone to feel intense irritation or discomfort.

questions.question: "Hobson's choice" means:/ "Hobson's choice" का अर्थ है:
options: A choice made by a friend
No real choice at all (take it or leave it)
questions.explanation: Hobson's choice is a situation where you appear to have a choice but there is actually no alternative.

questions.question: "Keep head above water" means:/ "Keep head above water" का अर्थ है:
options: To survive or manage financially despite difficulties
questions.explanation: It means to manage to live or keep a business going even though you have very little money.

questions.question: To "Draw the line" is to:/ "Draw the line" करने का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to set a limit on what you will do or allow to happen.

questions.question: A "Wild goose chase" is a:/ "Wild goose chase" है:
options: A futile or useless search or pursuit
questions.explanation: It refers to a search that is completely unsuccessful and a waste of time.

questions.question: "Beggars can't be choosers" means:/ "Beggars can't be choosers" का अर्थ है:
options: One must accept what is available when there are no other options
questions.explanation: It means that people who depend on the generosity of others should not complain about what they receive.

questions.question: "Walk on eggshells" means:/ "Walk on eggshells" का अर्थ है:
options: To act very carefully to avoid offending anyone
questions.explanation: It means to be very careful in the way you behave around someone because they are easily upset.

questions.question: "Fall foul of" means:/ "Fall foul of" का अर्थ है:
options: To get into trouble or conflict with someone/something
questions.explanation: It means to get into trouble with someone or an organization.

questions.question: To "Call a spade a spade" is to:/ "Call a spade a spade" करने का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: This means to speak frankly and directly about something, even if it's unpleasant.

questions.question: "Make hay while the sun shines" means:/ "Make hay while the sun shines" का अर्थ है:
options: To wait for a better day
To use an opportunity while it lasts
questions.explanation: It means to take advantage of favorable conditions while they exist.

questions.question: "Get cold feet" means:/ "Get cold feet" का अर्थ है:
options: To lose courage or become nervous
questions.explanation: It means to suddenly become too frightened to do something you had planned to do.

questions.question: "Pay through the nose" means:/ "Pay through the nose" का अर्थ है:
options: To pay an excessive amount of money
questions.explanation: It means to pay much more for something than it is really worth.

questions.question: To "Have an axe to grind" means:/ "Have an axe to grind" का अर्थ है:
options: To have a selfish motive or private reason
questions.explanation: It means to have a private reason for being involved in something or for arguing for a particular point of view.

questions.question: To be "On the warpath" is to be:/ "On the warpath" होने का अर्थ है:
options: Aggressive and looking for a fight/confrontation
questions.explanation: It means to be very angry and ready to argue or fight with someone.

questions.question: Something "Beyond the pale" is:/ "Beyond the pale" कुछ है:
questions.explanation: It refers to behavior that is considered unacceptable or improper.

questions.question: "Carry coals to Newcastle" implies:/ "Carry coals to Newcastle" का तात्पर्य है:
options: To perform a useless or redundant work
To do a very helpful job
questions.explanation: It means to do something that is unnecessary because there is already plenty of it.

questions.question: To "Play second fiddle" is to:/ "Play second fiddle" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To take a subordinate or less important role
questions.explanation: It means to be less important or in a weaker position than someone else.

questions.question: "Bear the brunt" means:/ "Bear the brunt" का अर्थ है:
options: To suffer the main force or worst part of something unpleasant
questions.explanation: It means to experience the worst part of a difficult situation.

questions.question: To "Nip in the bud" is to:/ "Nip in the bud" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To stop something at an early stage before it develops
questions.explanation: It means to stop a problem from becoming serious by dealing with it when it first starts.

questions.question: To "Write off" something is to:/ किसी चीज़ को "Write off" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To consider something as lost or useless
questions.explanation: It means to decide that a particular debt or account will not be paid and should be forgotten.

questions.question: To "Make ends meet" is to:/ "Make ends meet" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To manage expenses within one's income
questions.explanation: It means to have just enough money to pay for the things that you need.

questions.question: "Fish in troubled waters" means:/ "Fish in troubled waters" का अर्थ है:
options: To take advantage of a disturbed situation
To be a fisherman in a storm
To go swimming in a river
questions.explanation: It means to try to win an advantage from a difficult situation or from someone else's problems.

questions.question: To "Cast pearls before swine" is to:/ "Cast pearls before swine" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To waste effort or something valuable on someone who cannot appreciate it
questions.explanation: It means to offer something valuable to someone who does not understand its worth.

questions.question: "Cry over spilt milk" means:/ "Cry over spilt milk" का अर्थ है:
options: To complain about the quality of milk
To regret something that cannot be changed
To be very careful with food
questions.explanation: It means to waste time worrying about a mistake or misfortune that has already happened.

questions.question: A "Neck and neck" competition is:/ "Neck and neck" प्रतियोगिता है:
options: An equal competition with no clear winner
questions.explanation: It refers to a situation where competitors are level or equal.

questions.question: A "Storm in a teacup" is:/ "Storm in a teacup" है:
options: Great excitement or anger about a trivial matter
questions.explanation: It refers to a lot of unnecessary anger or worry about something that is not important.

questions.question: To "Feather one's nest" means:/ "Feather one's nest" का अर्थ है:
options: To build a house for birds
questions.explanation: It means to make yourself rich, especially by taking advantage of your position.

questions.question: "Tighten one's belt" means:/ "Tighten one's belt" का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to try to spend less money than you used to.

questions.question: To "Steal one's thunder" means:/ "Steal one's thunder" का अर्थ है:
options: To take credit for someone else's work or ideas
questions.explanation: It means to do what someone else was going to do before they do it, especially if this takes attention away from them.

questions.question: "Keep the wolf from the door" means:/ "Keep the wolf from the door" का अर्थ है:
options: To guard the house from animals
To lock the door at night
To be brave in front of enemies
questions.explanation: It means to have enough money to buy food and pay for basic necessities.

questions.question: What is the meaning of "Achilles' heel"?/ "Achilles' heel" का अर्थ क्या है?
questions.explanation: Achilles' heel means a vulnerable point or hidden weakness.

questions.question: "Leave no stone unturned" means:/ "Leave no stone unturned" का अर्थ है:
options: To try every possible way to achieve something
questions.explanation: It means to do everything possible to find something or to solve a problem.

questions.question: To "Make a clean breast of" something is to:/ किसी चीज़ को "Make a clean breast of" करने का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to tell the truth about something you have done wrong.

questions.question: To "Hang by a thread" means:/ "Hang by a thread" का अर्थ है:
options: To be in a very risky or uncertain situation
questions.explanation: It means to be in a very dangerous situation or to be close to failing.

questions.question: A "Black sheep" is a person who is:/ "Black sheep" एक ऐसा व्यक्ति है जो:
options: A disgrace to their family or group
questions.explanation: It refers to a member of a family or group who is considered a disgrace to them.

questions.question: To "Give short shrift" means:/ "Give short shrift" का क्या अर्थ है?
options: To lend money for a short time
To dismiss or treat someone with little attention
To be very kind to others
questions.explanation: To give short shrift means to dismiss someone or something quickly and without much care.

questions.question: To "Move the goalposts" means:/ "Move the goalposts" का अर्थ है:
options: To unfairly change the rules or conditions during a process
questions.explanation: It means to change the rules while someone is trying to do something.

questions.question: To "Set one's house in order" means:/ "Set one's house in order" का अर्थ है:
options: To organize or fix one's own affairs
questions.explanation: It means to solve your own problems before you try to solve other people's problems.

questions.question: To "Wear one's heart on one's sleeve" means:/ "Wear one's heart on one's sleeve" का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to make your feelings or emotions obvious to everyone.

questions.question: "Take the bull by the horns" means:/ "Take the bull by the horns" का अर्थ है:
options: To face a problem directly and boldly
questions.explanation: It means to deal with a difficult situation in a direct and confident way.

questions.question: To "Eat humble pie" is to:/ "Eat humble pie" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To admit a fault or apologize humbly
questions.explanation: It means to admit that you were wrong and say that you are sorry.

questions.question: To "Put cards on the table" means:/ "Put cards on the table" का अर्थ है:
options: To play a game of cards
To be frank and honest about one's intentions
questions.explanation: It means to be honest about what you think or what you are planning to do.

questions.question: "Cut the Gordian knot" means to:/ "Cut the Gordian knot" का अर्थ है:
options: To give up on a problem
To solve a difficult problem boldly
questions.explanation: It means to solve a complex problem using a simple and bold action.

questions.question: To be "In clover" means:/ "In clover" होने का अर्थ है:
options: To be prosperous or living a luxurious life
questions.explanation: It means to live a life of ease and luxury.

questions.question: "Above board" behavior is:/ "Above board" व्यवहार है:
questions.explanation: It means to be legitimate, honest, and open.

questions.question: A "Dark horse" is an:/ "Dark horse" एक है:
options: An unexpected winner or a person with hidden talents
questions.explanation: It refers to a candidate or competitor about whom little is known but who unexpectedly wins.

questions.question: "Make no bones about" something means:/ किसी चीज़ के बारे में "Make no bones about" का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: To make no bones about something means to state it clearly without any hesitation or doubt.

questions.question: A "Feather in one's cap" is:/ "Feather in one's cap" है:
questions.explanation: It refers to an accomplishment a person can be proud of.

questions.question: To "Split hairs" is to:/ "Split hairs" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To argue about trivial or unimportant details
questions.explanation: It means to argue about very small and unimportant differences.

questions.question: If you "See eye to eye" with someone, you:/ यदि आप किसी के साथ "See eye to eye" करते हैं, तो आप:
questions.explanation: It means to have the same opinion as someone else.

questions.question: To "Play fast and loose" is to:/ "Play fast and loose" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To behave in a dishonest or irresponsible way
questions.explanation: It means to treat something or someone without enough care or respect.

questions.question: "Cut no ice" means:/ "Cut no ice" का अर्थ है:
options: To have no effect or influence
questions.explanation: It means to fail to impress or influence someone.

questions.question: "Out of the frying pan into the fire" means:/ "Out of the frying pan into the fire" का अर्थ है:
options: From a bad situation to a worse one
questions.explanation: It means to go from a difficult situation to one that is even worse.

questions.question: "Throw cold water on" means:/ "Throw cold water on" का अर्थ है:
options: To discourage or dampen someone's enthusiasm
questions.explanation: It means to be negative about someone's ideas or plans.

questions.question: Being "Between the devil and the deep sea" means:/ "Between the devil and the deep sea" होने का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: This idiom refers to being caught between two equally unpleasant or dangerous situations.

questions.question: "Let the cat out of the bag" means:/ "Let the cat out of the bag" का अर्थ है:
options: To disclose a secret, often without intending to
questions.explanation: It means to reveal a secret by mistake.

questions.question: Being "On tenterhooks" means being:/ "On tenterhooks" होने का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to be in a state of nervous suspense or anticipation.

questions.question: If someone is "At sixes and sevens", they are:/ यदि कोई "At sixes and sevens" है, तो वह:
options: In a state of total confusion
questions.explanation: At sixes and sevens means to be in a state of confusion or disorder.

questions.question: "Hit the nail on the head" means:/ "Hit the nail on the head" का अर्थ है:
options: To be exactly right or accurate
questions.explanation: It means to describe exactly what is causing a situation or problem.

questions.question: "Come hell or high water" means:/ "Come hell or high water" का अर्थ है:
options: No matter what difficulties or obstacles arise
questions.explanation: It means determined to do something despite any difficulties.

questions.question: To "Take umbrage" is to:/ "Take umbrage" करने का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to feel upset or annoyed, usually because you think that someone has been rude or shown a lack of respect.

questions.question: "Like a bull in a china shop" refers to someone who is:/ "Like a bull in a china shop" उस व्यक्ति को संदर्भित करता है जो:
options: Extremely clumsy or tactless in a delicate situation
questions.explanation: It refers to a person who is very careless or clumsy in the way they behave.

questions.question: To be "Out of the woods" means:/ "Out of the woods" होने का अर्थ है:
options: To be lost in a jungle
To come out of a forest
To be out of danger or difficulty
questions.explanation: It means to no longer be in danger or experiencing a difficult situation.

questions.question: Something "Off the beaten track" is:/ "Off the beaten track" कुछ है:
options: Unusual or in a remote place
questions.explanation: It refers to places or things that are unusual or not frequently visited.

questions.question: A "Wolf in sheep's clothing" is:/ "Wolf in sheep's clothing" है:
options: A dangerous person pretending to be harmless
questions.explanation: It refers to a person who seems to be friendly or harmless but is actually dangerous.

questions.question: To be "On the horns of a dilemma" is to:/ "On the horns of a dilemma" होने का अर्थ है:
options: To have a difficult choice between two equal options
questions.explanation: It refers to a situation where one has to choose between two equally unsatisfactory alternatives.

questions.question: Being "In fine fettle" means being in:/ "In fine fettle" होने का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to be in a good physical or mental condition.

questions.question: An "Apple of discord" is:/ "Apple of discord" है:
options: A cause of quarrel or dispute
questions.explanation: It refers to the subject of a dispute or rivalry.

questions.question: "Back to the drawing board" means:/ "Back to the drawing board" का अर्थ है:
options: To start again because a previous attempt failed
questions.explanation: It means to start planning a piece of work again because the first plan was not successful.

questions.question: "Show the white feather" means:/ "Show the white feather" का अर्थ है:
options: To act in a cowardly manner
questions.explanation: Showing the white feather is a sign of cowardice.

questions.question: "Go whole hog" means:/ "Go whole hog" का अर्थ है:
options: To eat a lot of meat
To do something completely or thoroughly
questions.explanation: It means to do something as completely as possible.

questions.question: "Blow one's own trumpet" means:/ "Blow one's own trumpet" का अर्थ है:
options: To praise oneself or one's achievements
questions.explanation: It means to talk boastfully about one's own accomplishments.

questions.question: If someone "Draws a red herring", they are:/ यदि कोई "Draws a red herring" करता है, तो वह:
options: Trying to distract attention from the main issue
questions.explanation: A red herring is something that misleads or distracts from a relevant or important issue.

questions.question: "Rule of thumb" means:/ "Rule of thumb" का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It is a broadly accurate guide or principle based on experience rather than theory.

questions.question: To go "Through thick and thin" is to:/ "Through thick and thin" जाने का अर्थ है:
options: To be together in all conditions, good or bad
questions.explanation: It means under all circumstances, no matter how difficult they are.

questions.question: To "Pass muster" is to:/ "Pass muster" करने का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to be considered good enough.

questions.question: Being "Up in arms" means:/ "Up in arms" होने का अर्थ है:
options: In a state of angry protest
questions.explanation: It means to be very angry and protesting strongly about something.

questions.question: A "Bone of contention" is:/ "Bone of contention" है:
questions.explanation: It is a subject or issue over which there is continuing disagreement.

questions.question: Being "At daggers drawn" means being:/ "At daggers drawn" होने का अर्थ है:
options: Extremely hostile or ready to fight
questions.explanation: It means to be in a state of extreme unfriendliness or hostility.

questions.question: To "Weather the storm" means:/ "Weather the storm" का अर्थ है:
options: To survive a difficult situation or period
To go for a walk in rain
questions.explanation: It means to manage to get through a difficult period or situation.

questions.question: Being "On thin ice" means being in a:/ "On thin ice" होने का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to be in a situation where you are likely to get into trouble.

questions.question: What does it mean to "Blow hot and cold"?/ "Blow hot and cold" का क्या अर्थ है?
options: To be very angry and then calm
To be inconsistent in behavior or opinion
questions.explanation: Blow hot and cold means to be inconsistent or keep changing one's mind.

questions.question: A "Blue-eyed boy" is:/ "Blue-eyed boy" है:
options: A person with a medical condition
questions.explanation: It refers to a person who is particularly liked or favored by someone in authority.

questions.question: "Wash dirty linen in public" means:/ "Wash dirty linen in public" का अर्थ है:
options: To work in a laundry shop
To discuss private or embarrassing matters openly
questions.explanation: It means to expose private grievances or scandals in front of others.

questions.question: "Go to the dogs" implies:/ "Go to the dogs" का तात्पर्य है:
options: To be very fond of pets
To go for a morning walk
questions.explanation: If something goes to the dogs, it becomes much worse in quality or character.

questions.question: To "Take with a grain of salt" means:/ "Take with a grain of salt" का अर्थ है:
options: To listen with some doubt or skepticism
questions.explanation: It means to not completely believe something that you are told.

questions.question: "Give the devil his due" means:/ "Give the devil his due" का अर्थ है:
options: To pay a debt to a bad person
To admit merit or give credit even to a disliked person
questions.explanation: It means to acknowledge the good qualities of someone you do not like.

questions.question: To "Smell blood" is to:/ "Smell blood" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To sense weakness in an opponent
questions.explanation: It means to recognize that an opponent is weak and that you can defeat them.

questions.question: Something done "At the eleventh hour" is done:/ "At the eleventh hour" किया गया कार्य है:
questions.explanation: It refers to something happening at the latest possible time.

questions.question: "Put the cart before the horse" means:/ "Put the cart before the horse" का अर्थ है:
options: To do things in the wrong order
questions.explanation: It means to do things in the reverse of the logical or proper order.

questions.question: If someone is "In the doldrums", they are:/ यदि कोई "In the doldrums" है, तो वह:
questions.explanation: It means to be in a state of inactivity or low spirits.

questions.question: A "Blessing in disguise" is:/ "Blessing in disguise" है:
options: A hidden benefit from a seemingly bad event
questions.explanation: It is something that seems bad at first but results in something good happening later.

questions.question: To "Have the last laugh" is to:/ "Have the last laugh" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To achieve ultimate success after previous doubt or failure
To be the last one to leave a party
questions.explanation: It means to be successful or win an argument in the end.

questions.question: To "Keep at bay" means:/ "Keep at bay" का अर्थ है:
options: To prevent someone or something from approaching or harming you
questions.explanation: It means to prevent someone or something from coming too close.

questions.question: To "Pull someone's leg" means:/ "Pull someone's leg" का अर्थ है:
options: To tease or trick someone in a playful way
questions.explanation: It means to joke with someone by saying something that is not true.

questions.question: "Jump on the bandwagon" means:/ "Jump on the bandwagon" का अर्थ है:
options: To follow a popular trend or activity
questions.explanation: It means to join an activity that has become very popular or successful.

questions.question: To "Face the music" is to:/ "Face the music" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To accept the unpleasant consequences of one's actions
questions.explanation: It means to accept criticism or punishment for something you have done.

questions.question: If a matter is "Cut and dried", it is:/ यदि कोई मामला "Cut and dried" है, तो वह:
questions.explanation: It means already decided and unlikely to be changed.

questions.question: "Bark up the wrong tree" means:/ "Bark up the wrong tree" का अर्थ है:
options: To follow a mistaken line of thought or action
questions.explanation: It means to be wrong about the reason for something or the way to achieve something.

questions.question: "Bite the dust" means:/ "Bite the dust" का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to fail, die, or come to an end.

questions.question: "Make a mountain out of a molehill" means:/ "Make a mountain out of a molehill" का अर्थ है:
options: To solve a big problem easily
questions.explanation: It means to treat a minor problem as if it were a very serious one.

questions.question: To "Lay bare" something is to:/ किसी चीज़ को "Lay bare" करने का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to make something known that was previously hidden or secret.

questions.question: "The last straw" refers to:/ "The last straw" का तात्पर्य है:
options: The final irritation that makes a situation unbearable
questions.explanation: It is the last of a series of unpleasant events that makes you feel you cannot continue a situation.

questions.question: To explain something "In a nutshell" is to:/ "In a nutshell" कुछ समझाने का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to state something using as few words as possible.

questions.question: Something "In the offing" is:/ "In the offing" कुछ है:
questions.explanation: It means likely to happen or appear soon.

questions.question: "Move heaven and earth" means:/ "Move heaven and earth" का अर्थ है:
options: (क्रम जारी है... मैं 150 तक पहुँचने के लिए इसे तेजी से अपडेट कर रहा हूँ)
To try everything possible to achieve something
questions.explanation: It means to exert all possible effort or influence to accomplish a goal.

questions.question: To "Hit below the belt" is to:/ "Hit below the belt" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To act or speak in an unfair or cruel way
questions.explanation: It means to say something that is very insulting and unfair.

questions.question: A crime done "In cold blood" is:/ "In cold blood" किया गया अपराध है:
questions.explanation: It refers to a murder or other violent act done deliberately and without feeling.

questions.question: To "Sit on the fence" means:/ "Sit on the fence" का अर्थ है:
options: To remain neutral and avoid taking sides
questions.explanation: It means to delay making a decision.

questions.question: Being "Under one's thumb" means:/ "Under one's thumb" होने का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to be completely dominated or controlled by someone.

questions.question: To keep someone "At arm's length" is to:/ "At arm's length" रखने का अर्थ है:
options: To keep someone at a distance/avoid intimacy
questions.explanation: It means to avoid becoming too friendly or close with someone.

questions.question: "Burn the midnight oil" means:/ "Burn the midnight oil" का अर्थ है:
options: To work or study late into the night
questions.explanation: To burn the midnight oil means to work late at night.

questions.question: Achieve success "By hook or by crook" means:/ "By hook or by crook" सफलता प्राप्त करने का अर्थ है:
options: By any means, fair or foul
questions.explanation: By hook or by crook means by any method possible, whether honest or dishonest.

questions.question: "Stick to one's guns" means:/ "Stick to one's guns" का अर्थ है:
options: To stay firm in one's conviction or opinion
questions.explanation: It means to refuse to change your ideas or actions even when other people try to persuade you.

questions.question: To "Turn the tables" means:/ "Turn the tables" का अर्थ है:
options: To reverse a situation to one's advantage
questions.explanation: It means to change a situation so that you now have an advantage over someone who previously had an advantage over you.

questions.question: A "Bigwig" is a:/ "Bigwig" है:
questions.explanation: It refers to a person of importance or high rank.

questions.question: To "Leave in the lurch" means:/ "Leave in the lurch" का अर्थ है:
options: To abandon someone in a difficult situation
questions.explanation: It means to leave someone at a time when they need you.

questions.question: To "Eat one's words" is to:/ "Eat one's words" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To admit that one was wrong about something said
questions.explanation: It means to admit that something you said before was wrong.

questions.question: If you "Lose your bearings", you are:/ यदि आप "Lose your bearings" करते हैं, तो आप:
options: Confused about your position or situation
questions.explanation: It means to become confused about where you are or what you should do.

questions.question: "Strike while the iron is hot" means:/ "Strike while the iron is hot" का अर्थ है:
options: To act at the most favorable time
questions.explanation: It means to take advantage of an opportunity as soon as it exists.

questions.question: Progress "By leaps and bounds" is:/ "By leaps and bounds" प्रगति है:
questions.explanation: It means to improve or increase very quickly.

questions.question: To be "In the same boat" means:/ "In the same boat" होने का अर्थ है:
options: Being in the same difficult situation
questions.explanation: It means to be in the same unpleasant or difficult circumstances as others.

questions.question: "Cut the ground from under" means:/ "Cut the ground from under" का अर्थ है:
options: To weaken someone's position or argument
questions.explanation: It means to make someone's ideas or arguments seem less effective or credible.

questions.question: To be "On cloud nine" is to be:/ "On cloud nine" होने का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to be in a state of extreme happiness.

questions.question: "Once in a blue moon" means:/ "Once in a blue moon" का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It refers to an event that happens very infrequently.

questions.question: "Set the ball rolling" means:/ "Set the ball rolling" का अर्थ है:
options: To start an activity or process
questions.explanation: It means to make something start happening.

questions.question: A "Stone's throw" away means:/ "Stone's throw" दूर का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It refers to a very short distance.

questions.question: To be "At one's wit's end" means:/ "At one's wit's end" होने का अर्थ है:
options: To be at the end of a story
To be extremely confused or worried
questions.explanation: It means to be so worried or confused that you do not know what to do next.

questions.question: To "Upset the apple cart" is to:/ "Upset the apple cart" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To spoil someone's plans or a stable situation
questions.explanation: It means to do something that causes a plan to go wrong.

questions.question: "Bell the cat" refers to:/ "Bell the cat" का तात्पर्य है:
options: To take a risky task for the common lead
To play with danger for fun
questions.explanation: Bell the cat means to undertake a risky or dangerous task.

questions.question: To "Rock the boat" is to:/ "Rock the boat" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To disturb a stable or satisfactory situation
To go for a boat ride
questions.explanation: It means to do something that causes problems or upsets a balanced situation.

questions.question: To "Jump the gun" is to:/ "Jump the gun" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To act too early or prematurely
To participate in a shooting sport
questions.explanation: It means to do something before the right time.

questions.question: To "Go against the grain" means:/ "Go against the grain" का अर्थ है:
options: To oppose the natural trend or someone's wishes
questions.explanation: It means to do something that is the opposite of what is usual or expected.

questions.question: "Turn a deaf ear" means:/ "Turn a deaf ear" का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to refuse to listen or pay attention to someone's request or advice.

questions.question: To "Hang fire" is to:/ "Hang fire" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To delay or wait before taking action
questions.explanation: It means to delay or be slow in taking action or making a decision.

questions.question: To "Burn one's fingers" means:/ "Burn one's fingers" का अर्थ है:
options: To suffer a loss by acting rashly
questions.explanation: It means to suffer unpleasant consequences as a result of your own actions.

questions.question: "By and large" means:/ "By and large" का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means considering everything; in general.

questions.question: "Keep a tight rein" means:/ "Keep a tight rein" का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: It means to have total control over someone or something.

questions.question: To "Smell a rat" is to:/ "Smell a rat" करने का अर्थ है:
options: To suspect something is wrong or a trick
To be in a dirty place
questions.explanation: It means to suspect that something is wrong or that someone is being dishonest.

questions.question: To "Beat about the bush" means:/ "Beat about the bush" का अर्थ है:
options: To avoid the main topic/speak indirectly
questions.explanation: It means to avoid talking about the main point of a subject.

questions.question: To "Put one's foot down" means:/ "Put one's foot down" का अर्थ है:
options: To be firm and assertive about something
questions.explanation: It means to use your authority to stop something from happening.

questions.question: "Break the ice" means:/ "Break the ice" का अर्थ है:
options: To start an interaction or conversation
questions.explanation: It means to do or say something to relieve tension or get a conversation started.
